steps.title: Attach the opening modifier
steps.content: The opening participial phrase describes the basis of the drama Rabinal Achí, so the next subject should be the drama itself. It cannot logically modify K'iche' Achí, because he is a character in the story, not the work based on events.

steps.title: Reject dangling subjects
steps.content: B and C make K'iche' Achí the subject, and D makes there the subject. Those choices leave the opening modifier attached to the wrong noun. The drama tells the story, and the following relative clause can then describe the military leader without a dangling modifier. The answer is A.
